title: Marichi Temple
tagline: Marichi Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Marichi Temple (Odia: ମାରିଚୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is a Hindu and Buddhist temple located in Ajodhya, Baleswar, Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Purunagan
topPlaces.description: Purungan is a village located in the Baleswar district of India's Odisha state. The south side of the village has river Sono and north side of it has large cultivation lands.

topPlaces.name: Gopinathpur, Baleswar
topPlaces.description: Gopinathpur is a village in Baleswar Sadar subdistrict in Baleswar District in the Indian state of Odisha. As of 2001 it had a population of 986 in 240 households.

items.note: Purungan is a village located in the Baleswar district of India's Odisha state. The south side of the village has river Sono and north side of it has large cultivation lands.
Gopinathpur is a village in Baleswar Sadar subdistrict in Baleswar District in the Indian state of Odisha. As of 2001 it had a population of 986 in 240 households.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Marichi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Marichi Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Marichi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (175 km) and the nearest railway station is Jamshedpur (Tatanagar) (149 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Marichi Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Marichi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Marichi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Marichi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Marichi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Purunagan, Gopinathpur, Baleswar.
